bighorn.default_greeting: Welcome to Bighorn. Keep the peace here, you hear?

rank_greetings.Idolized: Our hero! Bighorn owes you everything! How can we help?
rank_greetings.Admired: Welcome back, friend of Bighorn. The town is in your debt.
rank_greetings.Liked: Good to see you! Want a drink on the house?
rank_greetings.Accepted: Hello there. What brings you to Bighorn?
rank_greetings.Neutral: Welcome to Bighorn. Keep the peace here, you hear?
rank_greetings.Shunned: I've heard things about you. Don't cause trouble.
rank_greetings.Disliked: You're not welcome here. Move along.

start.text: Welcome to Bighorn. Keep the peace here, you hear?

work.text: We could always use help around here. Raiders, mutants, you name it.

work_details.text: The old farm to the east has ghouls. Bunch of them. Clear them out and the farmer'll pay.

work_accept.text: Good citizen. Here's a little something to start.

supplies.text: The general store's got most things. Trader comes through every few days too.

store_location.text: Down the main road, can't miss it. Big sign says 'General Store'.

news.text: Raiders been getting bolder. NCR and Legion are both sniffing around. And that casino...

casino.text: Boneyard Casino. Fancy place, lots of caps. Word is they got ties to some shady folks.

passing.text: Safe travels then. Watch yourself on the roads.

bighorn_mayor.default_greeting: I am the Mayor. Bighorn is my responsibility.

rank_greetings.Idolized: Our greatest friend! Please, come in. How may the city honor you?
rank_greetings.Neutral: I am the Mayor. Bighorn is my responsibility.
rank_greetings.Vilified: You are not welcome in my office.

start.text: I am the Mayor. Bighorn is my responsibility. What do you need?

help_town.text: We need supplies, protection, everything really. If you can help, Bighorn won't forget it.

checking.text: Things are... holding. The NCR wants us to join them. The Legion too. Hard to choose.

bighorn_sheriff.default_greeting: I'm the law in Bighorn. Don't make me show you what that means.

rank_greetings.Idolized: Hero! Good to see you. Anything I can help with?
rank_greetings.Neutral: I'm the law in Bighorn. Don't make me show you what that means.
rank_greetings.Vilified: I've got my eye on you. Don't slip up.

start.text: I'm the law in Bighorn. Don't make me show you what that means. What do you want?

deputy.text: Could use another gun. Those ghouls on the eastern farm won't clear themselves.
